title: Verification Report
description: Structured output produced by reliability-verifier (and contributed to by reliability-lead's self-verification). Consumed by the deterministic Done Gate. Every claim must rest on an actually-executed command with observed output — no 'should work', no 'X% confident' without evidence.

status.description: Final status, decided by the deterministic Done Gate. VERIFIED requires every MUST backed by evidence, every test green after the final edit, build/typecheck/lint ok, no CRITICAL/HIGH, no scope violation, final check on clean checkout. There is no 'SHIP with 85%'.

evidence.description: Every command actually executed and its observed result. No entry may rest on a command that was not run.

command.description: The exact command executed (e.g., 'npm test -- --grep AC1', 'git diff --stat', 'tsc --noEmit').

result.description: Observed output or summary (exit code, failing test name, file list). Quote the relevant portion; do not paraphrase away load-bearing detail.

passed.description: True if the command's pass/fail oracle indicated pass; false otherwise.

acceptance_results.description: One entry per acceptance criterion in the task contract. The Done Gate requires every entry to be PASS for VERIFIED.

result.description: PASS = backed by executed evidence; FAIL = executed and observed failing; UNVERIFIED = no command was run for this criterion.

scope_violations.description: Files modified outside task-contract.allowed_scope. Any non-empty list blocks VERIFIED.

residual_unknowns.description: Unresolved questions or untested paths. Non-empty caps the status at PARTIALLY_VERIFIED at best.
